name: Brick Fire Tavern
tagline: Neapolitan wood-fired pizza with Hawaiian twists — kalua pig pizza, craft cocktails, and a loyal Kaimuki following.
mustOrder: kalua pig pizza — Hawaiian BBQ meets Neapolitan crust
craft cocktails — the bar program is legit
parking: Street parking on Waialae Ave; side streets toward Wilhelmina Rise
talkStory: Kaimuki's neighborhood pizzeria since ~2017, using a wood-fired oven and local ingredients in creative ways. The kalua pig pizza is the kind of thing that could only come from Hawaii. The cocktail program adds another dimension — this is as much a bar as a pizza spot. Well outside the tourist zone, the crowd is Kaimuki regulars and east Honolulu date-nighters. Opens 11am Tue–Sun. Reservations recommended for dinner.
